title: Ireland Short-Stay (C) Visa Application (AVATS)
description: Give the online details for an Irish short-stay "C" visa application (a proposed stay in Ireland of 90 days or less) through AVATS (Automated Visa Application and Tracking System), the online data-entry system operated by Immigration Service Delivery, Department of Justice, Home Affairs and Migration, at visas.inis.gov.ie. AVATS collects the applicant's details across a linear sequence of online pages, issues an eight-digit application number partway through (details can be saved and resumed for 30 days), and, once submitted, produces a printed "Application Form" (marked "NOT VALID FOR TRAVEL") that the applicant must sign and, together with supporting documents, the visa fee, and (where required) biometrics, submit in person or by post to the relevant Irish Embassy, Consulate, Visa Office, or Visa Application Centre; this document models only the online data-entry step, not that in-person submission. This document models an adult (18 or over) visa-required, non-EEA/Swiss/UK national applying for themselves for a Short Stay (C) visa for visit/tourism, business, a conference or event, or another short-stay purpose. Out of scope: preclearance applications (offered instead of a visa to non-visa-required nationalities); Long Stay (D) visas (e.g. Join Family applications, or any proposed stay over 90 days); the Free Movement Directive pathway for a family member of an EU/EEA/Swiss/UK national exercising free-movement rights; an application completed by a parent or legal guardian on behalf of an applicant under 18; the additional Employment Visa Application question set (Employment Permit/Atypical Working Authorisation reference, proposed Irish employer details); and the additional Study Visa Application question set (course acceptance, fees, English-language proficiency, educational history, financial sponsor for study). It does not submit the application; the live visas.inis.gov.ie AVATS source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: Immigration Service Delivery, Department of Justice, Home Affairs and Migration

source.documentRef: AVATS (Automated Visa Application and Tracking System) online application, per Immigration Service Delivery's field-by-field "Giving your details on AVATS" guidance

verification.notes: Closes the Visa vertical's IE gap (GOV-803 research cycle). Direct curl/fetch of visas.inis.gov.ie serves a JavaScript bot-verification interstitial (the same access-block class recorded elsewhere in this registry, e.g. france-visas.gouv.fr), but a headless Playwright browser with a realistic user agent passes the challenge and reaches the real AVATS wizard. This schema was authored from Immigration Service Delivery's own field-by-field "Giving your details on AVATS" guidance (last updated 2025-10-14, fetched directly with no access block) and the 'Required Documents - Short Stay C Visa' FAQ PDF, then field-by-field verified against the live wizard: a mock adult Indian national's Visit - Tourist / Short Stay (C) / Single-journey application was driven through every page from the Welcome screen through the Family Details page (eligibility/reason, passport & dates, personal details, residency & biometrics, full immigration-history branching, passport issue/expiry with both previous-passport slots, employment/college, travelling-with-others, contact/host in Ireland including both the personally-known and not-personally-known paths, and family details including the Married branch), confirming every live control ID, picklist, and requiredness rule this schema asserts, and catching/fixing several mismatches with the prose guidance in the process: the 'previously granted'/'previously refused' visa questions are independently mandatory, not conditioned on 'previously applied'; the grant/refusal detail sub-questions are each a single free-text field, not three; biometric exemption is always asked, not conditioned on current-location country; up to two (not one) previous passports are accepted, and none of the previous-passport fields are actually mandatory; the host/contact address has four lines, not three, and carries optional date-of-birth/email fields on the personally-known branch; the criminal-conviction section has no separate trial-date input; family-in-Ireland surname/forename are separate fields; relationship-to-applicant pickers are closed enumerations, not free text; and the live system also surfaced a country-coverage-dependent online visa-fee-payment facility (phased rollout from 8 December 2025) not mentioned in the reviewed guidance, noted on the proofOfFeePayment document entry. The Form Assistance and Declaration pages (the flow's final two steps), and the dependent-children repeating sub-fields, were not independently reached in this pass and remain modelled from the prose guidance alone; the exact Declaration attestation wording is shown only within the live session and is not reproduced here. No data was submitted; every test session was abandoned before the final Submit step. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality (country that issued the passport you will travel on)
fields.description: Pick the country for which you hold a passport. Applicants with dual nationality pick the country that issued the passport they intend to travel on; a holder of a 1951 Refugee Convention Travel Document picks "Stateless". This answer determines which application categories AVATS offers in the Reason for Travel question.

fields.name: visaOrPreclearanceType
fields.label: Type of Visa or Preclearance
fields.description: Confirmed live as a direct two-option radio choice labelled "Short Stay (C)" / "Long Stay (D)" (AVATS control rdblstVisaStayType). The reviewed guidance describes some Reason for Travel values as forcing this choice (e.g. a visit visa is always Short Stay (C); a Join Family application is always Long Stay (D)); AVATS may pre-select or lock the radio in those cases via client-side script. This schema models only the Short Stay (C) pathway (a proposed stay of 90 days or less) for a visa-required nationality — Long Stay (D) visas and preclearance applications are out of scope.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Type of Visa or Preclearance

fields.name: reasonForTravel
fields.label: Reason for Travel
fields.description: Confirmed live AVATS picklist (control ddlVisaCategory) includes, among others: Business, Conference/Event, Employment, Exam, three "Family member of EU/EEA/Swiss cit." variants, International Protection - Family Reunification, Internship, six "Join Family" variants, Join Ship, Marriage, Medical Treatment, Minister of Religion, Other, Performance/Tournament, Study, Training, Transit, Visit - Family, Visit - Friend, Visit - Tourist, Volunteer, and six "Preclearance - ..." variants. All are truthful, well-formed answers; values outside this schema's eligible set route to a Long Stay (D) application, a preclearance application, or an additional purpose-specific question set (Employment Visa Application / Study Visa Application sections) not modelled by this schema.

fields.name: journeyType
fields.label: Journey Type
fields.description: A Single Journey visa allows one trip to Ireland while valid; a Multiple Journey visa allows more than one. The application fee for Multiple is higher than for Single, and an overpayment is not refunded if only Single is granted.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Single or Multiple Journey Visa

fields.name: purposeOfTravelDetails
fields.label: Purpose of Travel (additional information)
fields.description: Optional free-text elaboration on the reason for travel; important to complete when Reason for Travel is "Other".

fields.name: passportType
fields.label: Type of Passport
fields.description: Confirmed live AVATS picklist (control ddlPassportType). Most applicants hold a National Passport.

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: Passport Number
fields.description: As shown on the passport or travel document used to apply.

fields.name: proposedEntryDate
fields.label: Proposed date of entry to Ireland
fields.description: Date the applicant intends to enter Ireland.

fields.name: proposedExitDate
fields.label: Proposed date of leaving Ireland
fields.description: For a multiple-entry application, the intended date of leaving Ireland on the first trip. AVATS allows this to be left blank only for a Long Stay application or a Free Movement Directive family-member application intending to stay over 90 days — both out of scope for this Short Stay (C) schema, so this field is always required here.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Surname (family name)
fields.description: As it appears on the passport. If the passport shows only a forename or only a surname, AVATS still requires an answer to both questions; the convention is to enter "." in the one that would otherwise be blank.

fields.name: forename
fields.label: Forename (given name)
fields.description: As it appears on the passport. See surname for the "." convention when the passport has no forename.

fields.name: otherName
fields.label: Any other name (e.g. maiden name or name at birth)
fields.description: AVATS requires an answer to this question; enter "." if there is no other name to give.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Displayed on the live AVATS form as ddmmyyyy (e.g. 07091982 for 7 September 1982); modelled here as an ISO full-date per the GovSchema date type.

fields.name: gender
fields.label: Gender
fields.description: Confirmed live as a two-option radio choice labelled "Male" / "Female" (AVATS control rdblstGender).

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of birth
fields.description: Picked from a country list.

fields.name: currentLocationCountry
fields.label: Current location (country of residence)
fields.description: The country where the applicant is currently living. "Ireland" is not offered — a visa/preclearance application cannot be made while already in Ireland.

fields.name: currentAddressLine1
fields.label: Current address, line 1
fields.description: A Post Office Box address is not accepted.

fields.name: currentAddressLine2
fields.label: Current address, line 2
fields.description: Optional continuation line; AVATS allows up to 4 address lines.

fields.name: currentAddressLine3
fields.label: Current address, line 3
fields.description: Optional continuation line; AVATS allows up to 4 address lines.

fields.name: currentAddressLine4
fields.label: Current address, line 4
fields.description: Optional continuation line; AVATS allows up to 4 address lines.

fields.name: contactPhone
fields.label: Contact telephone number
fields.description: A number at which the Deciding Officer can contact the applicant during daytime working hours.

fields.name: residenceDurationYears
fields.label: Length of residence in present country — years
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: residenceDurationMonths
fields.label: Length of residence in present country — months
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: permissionToReturn
fields.label: Do you have permission to return to your present country of residence after your stay in Ireland?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: biometricsExempt
fields.label: Are you exempt from the requirement to provide biometrics?
fields.description: Confirmed live as an always-mandatory question on the Immigration History page (AVATS control rdblstBiometric), with a linked "Checklist of Biometric Exemptions". This contradicts the reviewed prose guidance's suggestion that the question is only shown for applicants resident in certain countries; live behaviour is authoritative.

fields.name: biometricsExemptionBasis
fields.label: Basis of biometric exemption

enum: Head of State or household member
Head of Government or Government Minister, or household member
Accredited diplomat, consular officer, or household member
Diplomat transiting the State, or household member
Diplomat in a Government Minister delegation with note verbale and invitation letter
Intergovernmental-organisation official or household member (with supporting note and invitation letter)
Airline crew member transiting within 7 days

fields.description: The ten exemption categories set out in the AVATS guidance's biometric-exemption list.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Exemptions from giving biometric information

fields.name: previouslyAppliedForIrishVisaOrPreclearance
fields.label: Have you ever applied for an Irish visa or preclearance?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: previouslyGrantedIrishVisaOrPreclearance
fields.label: Have you ever been granted an Irish visa or preclearance?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record
fields.description: Confirmed live as an independent mandatory question (AVATS control rdblstVisaIssue), asked regardless of the answer to "have you ever applied" — not a sub-question of it as the reviewed guidance prose implied.

fields.name: previousGrantDetails
fields.label: Location, application number, and year of the previously granted visa/preclearance
fields.description: Confirmed live as a single free-text field (AVATS control txtrefNo): "Please provide the location, application number and year of issue."
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: previouslyRefusedIrishVisaOrPreclearance
fields.label: Have you ever been refused an Irish visa or preclearance?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record
fields.description: Confirmed live as an independent mandatory question (AVATS control rdblstRefusedVisa), asked regardless of the answer to "have you ever applied" — not a sub-question of it as the reviewed guidance prose implied.

fields.name: previousRefusalDetails
fields.label: Location of application, year, and reference number of the previous refusal
fields.description: Confirmed live as a single free-text field (AVATS control txtlocOfAppRefuse): "If you have been refused before, please provide location of application, year and reference number."
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: previouslyVisitedIreland
fields.label: Have you ever been to Ireland before (legally or illegally, at any time)?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: previousVisitPurpose
fields.label: Purpose of your previous trip to Ireland
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: previousVisitDeptOfJusticeRef
fields.label: Department of Justice reference number from a previous stay (if issued)
fields.description: Optional; most short-stay visitors will not have been issued one.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: previousVisitGnibNumber
fields.label: Garda National Immigration Bureau (GNIB) number from a previous stay (if issued)
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: previousVisitPpsNumber
fields.label: Personal Public Service (PPS) number from a previous stay (if issued)
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: familyMembersInIreland
fields.label: Do you have family members living in Ireland (including extended family and former spouse/step-family)?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: familyMemberSurname
fields.label: Surname of your main family contact in Ireland
fields.description: Confirmed live as separate surname/forename fields (AVATS controls txtSurnameFamilyInIreland / txtForenamesFamilyInIreland). AVATS provides space for one family contact; applicants with more than one family member in Ireland list the rest on a separate sheet submitted with supporting documentation.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: familyMemberForename
fields.label: Forename of your main family contact in Ireland
fields.description: Confirmed live as separate surname/forename fields (AVATS controls txtSurnameFamilyInIreland / txtForenamesFamilyInIreland). AVATS provides space for one family contact; applicants with more than one family member in Ireland list the rest on a separate sheet submitted with supporting documentation.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: familyMemberDateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth of your main family contact in Ireland
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: familyMemberRelationship
fields.label: Relationship of your main family contact in Ireland to you
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record
fields.description: Confirmed live AVATS picklist (control ddlRelationToApplicant).

fields.name: familyMemberDeptOfJusticeRef
fields.label: Family member's Department of Justice reference number (non-EEA/Swiss/UK nationals)
fields.description: Begins with "69/"; only some longer-resident family members were issued this (legacy) number, and it does not appear on an Irish Residence Permit. Leave blank if never issued.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: refusedEntryToIreland
fields.label: Have you ever been refused entry to Ireland by an Irish Immigration Officer at a port of entry?
fields.description: Covers being refused entry after travelling with a visa, without a visa, with preclearance, or without preclearance.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: deportedOrNotifiedFromIreland
fields.label: Have you ever been deported from Ireland, or notified that you are subject to a Deportation Order?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: refusedVisaOtherCountry
fields.label: Have you ever been refused a visa for a country other than Ireland?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: refusedEntryDeportedOverstayedOtherCountry
fields.label: Have you ever been refused entry to, deported from, or otherwise asked to leave a country other than Ireland?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: otherCountryImmigrationIssueDetails
fields.label: Details of the country, dates, and reason
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: hasCriminalConvictions
fields.label: Do you have any criminal convictions?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record

fields.name: convictionReason
fields.label: Reason for the conviction (what was the crime)
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtConvictionDtls).

fields.name: convictionTrialLocation
fields.label: Where the trial took place (and, if relevant, when)
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record
fields.description: Confirmed live as a single free-text field (AVATS control txtConvictionLoc). There is no separate trial-date input on the live system despite the reviewed guidance's "when was the trial" question; if needed, record the date within this field or convictionSentenceLength.

fields.name: convictionSentenceLength
fields.label: Length of sentence
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Immigration history and criminal record
fields.description: Confirmed live as a free-text field (AVATS control txtConvictionSentence).

fields.name: passportIssuingCountryOrOrganisation
fields.label: Country or organisation which issued your passport/travel document
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: passportDateOfIssue
fields.label: Passport/travel document date of issue
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: passportDateOfExpiry
fields.label: Passport/travel document date of expiry
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: isFirstPassport
fields.label: Is this your first passport?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: previousPassportNumber
fields.label: 1. Previous passport/travel document number
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtPPTNo1) as an OPTIONAL field, not enforced as mandatory even when isFirstPassport is false — contrary to this schema's original reading of the prose guidance. AVATS provides space for up to two previous passports; applicants with more list the rest on a separate sheet submitted with supporting documentation.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: previousPassportIssuingAuthority
fields.label: 1. Previous passport issuing country or organisation
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Passport issue and expiry
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtIssueAuth1), optional.

fields.name: previousPassportDateOfIssue
fields.label: 1. Previous passport date of issue
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Passport issue and expiry
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtIssueDate1), optional.

fields.name: previousPassportDateOfExpiry
fields.label: 1. Previous passport date of expiry
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Passport issue and expiry
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtExpDate1), optional.

fields.name: previousPassportNumber2
fields.label: 2. Previous passport/travel document number
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtPPTNo2), optional; the second of up to two previous-passport slots AVATS provides.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: previousPassportIssuingAuthority2
fields.label: 2. Previous passport issuing country or organisation
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtIssueAuth2), optional.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: previousPassportDateOfIssue2
fields.label: 2. Previous passport date of issue
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtIssueDate2), optional.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: previousPassportDateOfExpiry2
fields.label: 2. Previous passport date of expiry
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtExpDate2), optional.
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Passport issue and expiry

fields.name: travellingWithOthers
fields.label: Will you be travelling with any other person (business colleague, family member, or as part of a group)?

fields.name: travelCompanionsDetails
fields.label: Names and relationship (if any) of travelling companions
fields.description: AVATS provides space for up to four companions (or, for a group, the group leader's name). Applicants travelling with more than four people list the rest on a separate sheet submitted with supporting documentation.

fields.name: hostAddressLine1
fields.label: Address in Ireland where you will stay, or your Irish-based contact/host's address, line 1
fields.description: If no personal contact or host, give the accommodation address; enter "Not arranged" if accommodation is not yet arranged. If travelling on business/to a conference/event give the Irish-based host/organiser's business address; if coming to work/study give the employer/college's address; if visiting/joining family or friends give their home address.

fields.name: hostAddressLine3
fields.label: Address in Ireland, line 3
fields.description: Confirmed live: AVATS provides 4 address lines for the host/contact address (control txtAddressln3).

fields.name: hostAddressLine4
fields.label: Address in Ireland, line 4
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtAddressln4).
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Contact/Host in Ireland

fields.name: hostContactPhone
fields.label: Daytime telephone number at which the Irish contact/host can be reached

fields.name: hostPersonallyKnown
fields.label: Is your host/contact in Ireland personally known to you?

fields.name: hostDeptOfJusticeRef
fields.label: Host/contact's Department of Justice, Home Affairs and Migration reference number (non-EEA/Swiss/UK nationals)
fields.description: Begins with "69/"; only some longer-resident contacts were issued this (legacy) number, and it does not appear on an Irish Residence Permit. Leave blank if never issued.

fields.name: hostDateOfBirth
fields.label: Host/contact's date of birth
fields.description: Confirmed live as an optional field (AVATS control txtDOB, on the host-personally-known branch).
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Contact/Host in Ireland

fields.name: hostEmail
fields.label: Host/contact's email address
fields.description: Confirmed live as an optional field (AVATS control txtEmail, on the host-personally-known branch).
fields.sourceRef: AVATS live system — Contact/Host in Ireland

fields.name: hostContactNameIfNotPersonallyKnown
fields.label: Surname and forename of the person you have had contact with at the company/college/organisation

fields.name: spouseOtherName
fields.label: Spouse/partner's other name (e.g. maiden name or name at birth)

fields.name: spouseHasOwnPassport
fields.label: Does your spouse/partner hold their own passport?
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control rdblstOwnPassport), asked before the spouse/partner passport number field.

fields.name: spousePassportNumber
fields.label: Spouse/partner's passport number
fields.description: Confirmed live (AVATS control txtSpousePPTNo), asked only when spouseHasOwnPassport is true.

fields.name: spouseCurrentCountryOfResidence
fields.label: Country in which your spouse/partner currently lives

fields.name: spouseTravellingWithApplicant
fields.label: Will your spouse/partner be travelling with you?
fields.description: If your spouse/partner also requires a visa or preclearance, they must make their own separate application (and pay a separate fee, if any).

fields.name: dependentChildrenCount
fields.label: Number of dependent children
fields.description: AVATS provides space for up to six dependent children on the form itself; families with more list the rest on a separate sheet submitted with supporting documentation. If any dependent child is visa- or preclearance-required, they must make a separate application and pay a separate fee (if any).

fields.name: dependentChildrenDetails
fields.label: Dependent children's details (surname, forename, date of birth, gender, nationality, and whether travelling on your passport or their own)

fields.name: receivedFormAssistance
fields.label: Did you receive assistance from an agent or agency in giving these details?
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Assistance with this form

fields.name: formAssistanceAgentName
fields.label: Name of the agent
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Assistance with this form

fields.name: formAssistanceAgencyNameAndAddress
fields.label: Name and address of the agency
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Assistance with this form

fields.name: formAssistanceContactPhone
fields.label: Daytime telephone number at which the agent can be contacted
fields.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Assistance with this form

documents.label: Signed AVATS application summary form
documents.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Get the Application Form / Submission of application and documents

documents.label: Signed Declaration on the printed Application Form
documents.sourceRef: AVATS guidance — Declaration. Only the applicant may sign; a parent or legal guardian signs on behalf of an applicant under 18. The exact Declaration wording is shown only within the live, authenticated AVATS session and is not reproduced in the reviewed guidance.

documents.label: Passport or travel document used to apply
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ

documents.label: All previous passports
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ

documents.label: 2 passport-sized photographs
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ

documents.label: Proof of visa fee payment, or evidence of a fee exemption
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ. Confirmed live: AVATS' own homepage states a phased online visa-fee-payment facility began 8 December 2025, with country coverage expanding over time (see AVATS Online Payments Country Coverage on the live homepage); where the applicant's country is not yet covered, the fee is paid by another method the generated application summary form specifies.

documents.label: Evidence of permission to reside in your current country, if it did not issue your passport
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ — Required only where the applicant lives in a country other than the one that issued their passport/travel document: a full-colour copy of the residence permission (both sides, if a card) and confirmation of at least 3 months' permission to remain after the planned date of leaving Ireland. Not expressible as a single-field requiredWhen condition in this schema; see the source FAQ for the exact trigger.

documents.label: Documentation on previous visa refusals, other immigration issues, or criminal convictions
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ

documents.label: Travel or medical insurance, where required
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ — Not universally required; whether it applies depends on the applicant's nationality and itinerary.

documents.label: Signed and dated application letter
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ — Must contain: the applicant's full contact details; the AVATS application number; details of family members in Ireland, in the UK, and in any EU/EEA member state; the reason for the proposed trip; and a commitment to obey the conditions of the visa in full, not rely on public services or become a burden on the State, and leave Ireland before the immigration permission expires.

documents.label: Itinerary
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ — What the applicant will do in Ireland, the proposed dates of travel, and how they will travel there. If the travel path involves other countries, evidence of the necessary visas for those countries (or an explanation why none is held).

documents.label: Proof of accommodation
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ — Printed reservation confirmations (emails or letters) showing the dates of stay at each place. If staying with family or friends instead, state who the applicant is staying with and provide evidence that person lives at that address (e.g. a tenancy agreement and a recent utility bill).

documents.label: Evidence of finances
documents.sourceRef: Required Documents — Short Stay 'C' Visa FAQ — 6 months' bank statements. If someone else is funding the trip, that sponsor's own financial evidence instead (e.g. a tax document such as an end-of-year return, or an employment detail summary).
